title: Before You Trade — our pre-signal data-check
_note: EVERGREEN v2 (#BeforeYouTrade). Retoned to Variant B: our public pre-signal data-check. '[X]%' replaced with neutral wording (no placeholder) so it ships ready. Pure-value, no CTA.
body:
✅ #BeforeYouTrade — how we check a signal before posting it

Before a #Signal goes to the channel, it passes this:

☐ CoinGlass funding + liq heatmap — is the SL NOT in a liquidation magnet?
☐ Bitunix funding pulled straight off the exchange (not from an aggregator)?
☐ Confluence ≥2 sources OR ≥2 data confirmations?
☐ Entry zone and TP1/TP2/TP3 defined before entry?
☐ Sizing rule set — risk within the fixed limit you set for yourself?
☐ Extreme funding? → crowd is crowded → we consider a fade.
☐ SL set BEFORE entry, not after?

Run the same check on your own trades. Don't clear every box — the best trade is the one you skip.

#BeforeYouTrade
